_meta.description: High-stakes response boundaries for legal and medical document intelligence answers.

rules.trigger: Medical diagnosis or treatment language requires explicit safety qualifier.
rules.check: context.domain == 'medical' AND output.matchesPattern('\b(definitive diagnosis|you have|you are diagnosed|prescribe(?:d)?\s+\w+)\b', 'i') == true AND output.matchesPattern('\b(consult|seek|professional|doctor|physician|medical advice|nao substitui|procure)\b', 'i') == false

rules.trigger: Legal instruction language should be constrained to document interpretation, not direct legal advice.
rules.check: context.domain == 'legal' AND output.matchesPattern('\b(you should sue|file this immediately|ignore this obligation|sign this now)\b', 'i') == true
